overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a high-fidelity game engine showing a character navigating a canoe through a rocky river canyon. The journey progresses from turbulent rapids through a narrow gorge, passing under a wooden bridge, and emerging into a wide mountain valley with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance.

events.description: wooden bridge becomes visible in the distance down the canyon
canoe maneuvers around large boulders in the turbulent rapids

agents.ego_description: paddling a canoe through turbulent white-water rapids, steering between rocks in the narrow canyon

entered.detail: steep gray rock face forming the left side of the canyon
steep gray rock face forming the right side of the canyon
large rock protruding from the rapids creating white water
rustic wooden bridge spanning the canyon in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a shadowy, narrow canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The canoe navigates through turbulent rapids and around large boulders while approaching a wooden bridge visible in the distance. The lighting is diffused by the high canyon walls, creating a sheltered, enclosed atmosphere.

events.description: canoe passes underneath the wooden bridge structure
exiting the deep shadow of the canyon into brighter light as the walls recede

agents.ego_description: paddling under the wooden bridge and continuing through the narrowing canyon toward the light

entered.detail: the underside and support beams of the bridge passing overhead
small waterfall cascading down the canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The canoe passes directly under the wooden bridge, revealing its rustic support structure overhead. After emerging, the canyon walls draw closer while a small waterfall appears on the left. The lighting gradually brightens as the canyon begins to open up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide mountain river valley with distant peaks

events.description: canyon walls recede revealing wide valley and snow-capped mountains in the distance
river widens and current slows significantly in the open valley

agents.ego_description: paddling steadily through calm waters of the open valley toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: distant mountain range with white snow peaks visible against the blue sky
tree-covered slopes along the riverbank with green foliage
tree-covered slopes along the riverbank with scattered pines

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens dramatically into a wide, sunlit valley with forested banks. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance against a bright sky. The river becomes calm and broad as the canoe paddles steadily toward the scenic mountain vista, transitioning from the enclosed gorge to an expansive natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowy, enclosed river canyon that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit mountain valley. It begins in a narrow gorge with steep rock walls, navigating a canoe through turbulent rapids and around large boulders under diffused, sheltered lighting. As the canoe passes directly under the rustic support structure of a wooden bridge, the canyon walls tighten momentarily and a small waterfall appears on the left before the light begins to brighten. The scene then expands dramatically as the river widens and the walls recede, revealing forested banks and a calm current. Finally, the vista opens completely to show snow-capped mountains rising against a bright sky, transitioning the journey from the claustrophobic gorge to an expansive natural landscape.
